question_tagalog: Ano ang pinaka-naaappreciate mo sa mga ginagawa ko para sayo araw-araw?
question_english: What do you appreciate the most from what I do for you every day?
quote_tagalog: Salamat sa effort mo palagi kahit sa maliliit na bagay.
quote_english: Thank you for your effort always even in small things.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo huling naramdaman na sobrang swerte mo sakin?
question_english: When was the last time you felt so lucky to have me?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang pinakaswerte dahil sayo.
quote_english: I am the luckiest because of you.

question_tagalog: Anong trait ko ang pinaka-proud kang i-flex sa iba?
question_english: What trait of mine are you most proud to flex to others?
quote_tagalog: Proud na proud akong ikaw ang partner ko.
quote_english: I'm so proud that you're my partner.

question_tagalog: Paano mo gusto tinatanggap yung appreciation: words, gifts, or hugs?
question_english: How do you prefer receiving appreciation: words, gifts, or hugs?
quote_tagalog: Aaraw-arawin kitang papupurihan.
quote_english: I will praise you every single day.

question_tagalog: Ano yung isang effort ko recently na hindi mo expected pero na-touch ka ng sobra?
question_english: What's an effort I made recently that you unexpectedly got so touched by?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng ginagawa mo, nakikita at nararamdaman ko.
quote_english: Everything you do, I see and feel it.

question_tagalog: Saan mo unang nakita yung dedication ko satin nung simula palang tayo?
question_english: Where did you first see my dedication to us from the start?
quote_tagalog: Hindi magbabago ang dedication ko sayo.
My dedication to you will not change.

question_tagalog: Ano yung sakripisyo ko na pinaka-tumatak sa puso mo?
question_english: What sacrifice of mine left the biggest mark on your heart?
quote_tagalog: Worth it ka kaya nagsakripisyo ako.
quote_english: You are worth it so I sacrificed.

question_tagalog: Pag pagod ka galing work, ano yung munting bagay na ginagawa ko na nakakapawi nun?
question_english: When you're tired from work, what's a small thing I do that relieves it?
quote_tagalog: Pahinga na tayo, nandito lang ako sa tabi mo.
quote_english: Let's rest now, I'm just right beside you.

question_tagalog: Ano sa mga physical features ko ang pinaka-naaappreciate mo?
question_english: What physical feature of mine do you appreciate the most?
quote_tagalog: Ang ganda ng mga ngiti mo araw araw.
quote_english: Your smiles are beautiful every day.

question_tagalog: Paano mo gustong ma-appreciate ang kapintasan natin sa isa't isa?
question_english: How do you want us to appreciate our flaws?
quote_tagalog: Tanggap ko buong ikaw kahit may mali.
quote_english: I accept you wholly despite your flaws.

question_tagalog: Kailan ako naging pinaka-supportive partner in your eyes?
question_english: When was I the most supportive partner in your eyes?
quote_tagalog: Lagi kitang susuportahan sa lahat ng pangarap mo.
quote_english: I'll always support you in all your dreams.

question_tagalog: Ano yung hobby ko na naa-appreciate mong ginagawa ko during my free time?
question_english: What hobby of mine do you appreciate me doing during my free time?
quote_tagalog: Gusto kitang makitang masaya sa mga trip mo.
quote_english: I want to see you happy with your hobbies.

question_tagalog: Anong love language ko yung ramdam na ramdam mo lately?
question_english: What love language of mine have you strongly felt lately?
quote_tagalog: Ipaparamdam ko araw-araw na mahal kita.
quote_english: I'll make you feel that I love you every day.

question_tagalog: Ano yung favorite memory mo na kasama parents ko?
question_english: What is your favorite memory being with my parents?
quote_tagalog: Salamat kasi pamilya na din ang turing mo sa pamilya ko.
quote_english: Thank you for treating my family as your family too.

question_tagalog: Anong word of affirmation ang madalas mong inaantay mula sakin pagnahihirapan ka?
question_english: What word of affirmation do you often wait from me when you're struggling?
quote_tagalog: Kaya mo yan, nandito lang ako para uma-alalay.
quote_english: You can do it, I'm just here to support you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pabango ko na sobrang naaappreciate mo pag naamoy mo?
question_english: What perfume of mine do you appreciate so much when you smell it?
quote_tagalog: Amoy mo pa lang, calm na araw ko.
quote_english: Just your scent sets my day calm.

question_tagalog: Anong simple rule sa relationship natin ang sobrang thankful ka?
question_english: What simple rule in our relationship are you extremely thankful for?
quote_tagalog: Salamat sa rules natin that makes us strong.
quote_english: Thank you for our rules that makes us strong.

question_tagalog: Paano ko napagaan ang feeling mo during your darkest days?
question_english: How did I lighten your feeling during your darkest days?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang liwanag mo pag madilim ang mundo.
quote_english: I am your light when the world is dark.

question_tagalog: Ano yung ginagawa ko na the best mag-encourage sayo from failure?
question_english: What do I do that's the best to encourage you from failure?
quote_tagalog: Mabigo ka man, champion ka pa rin skin.
quote_english: Even if you fail, you're still a champion to me.

question_tagalog: Ano yung weird habit ko na inaappreciate mong andyan talaga?
question_english: What weird habit of mine do you appreciate is just there?
quote_tagalog: Cute ka parin kahit may weird habits ka.
quote_english: You're still cute even with weird habits.

question_tagalog: Anong dish yung pinaka-naappreciate mong niluto ko para sayo?
question_english: What dish do you appreciate the most that I cooked for you?
quote_tagalog: Gusto kong laging lutuan ka ng paborito mo.
quote_english: I want to always cook your favorite for you.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo na-feel na tama naging desisyon mong piliin ako?
question_english: When did you feel your decision to choose me was right?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ka magsisisi sa desisyon mong ito.
quote_english: You won't regret this decision.

question_tagalog: Pano natin ipinagdiriwang effectively yung wins ng isa't isa?
question_english: How do we celebrate each other's wins effectively?
quote_tagalog: Masaya ako sa kada tagumpay na nakamit mo.
quote_english: I'm happy for every success you achieved.

question_tagalog: Paano kita nagagawang patawanin tuwing umiiyak ka?
question_english: How do I manage to make you laugh when you're crying?
quote_tagalog: Gustong-gusto kong pinapatawa ka palagi.
quote_english: I really love making you laugh always.

question_tagalog: Ano yung aspect sa career ko na gusto mo ipamukha sa mundo?
question_english: What aspect in my career do you want to show off to the world?
quote_tagalog: Proud na proud talaga ako sa pangarap mo.
quote_english: I am truly proud of your dreams.

question_tagalog: Kung magpapasalamat ka sa isang struggle natin, ano yun?
question_english: If you'd be thankful for one of our struggles, what is it?
quote_tagalog: Salamat sa hirap kasi mas nag-grow tayo ngayon.
quote_english: Thanks to the hardship 'cause we grew more today.

question_tagalog: Paano mo ipapahayag sa the whole world na inlove ka sakin ngayon?
question_english: How would you express to the whole world that you're inlove with me now?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ipagsisigawan ko forever ha.
quote_english: I'll only shout your name forever.

question_tagalog: Anong advice ko ang hinding-hindi mo nakakalimutan?
question_english: What advice of mine have you never forgotten?
quote_tagalog: Nandito lang ako para gabayan ka palagi.
quote_english: I'm just here to guide you always.

question_tagalog: Ano yung best surprise gift ko na pinaka naaappreciate mo?
question_english: What is the best surprise gift from me that you appreciate the most?
quote_tagalog: Buong buhay ko i-surprise kita na masaya.
quote_english: All my life I'll surprise you happily.

question_tagalog: Ano yung physical touch natin na nararamdaman mo yung deep appreciation ko sayo?
question_english: What physical touch of ours makes you feel my deep appreciation for you?
quote_tagalog: Ramdam ko yung pag-ibig sa mga hawak mo.
quote_english: I feel the love through your touch.

question_tagalog: Anong pinaka-naaappreciate mo tuwing ginagawa natin ung mga paborito nating hobbies?
question_english: What do you appreciate the most whenever we do our favorite hobbies?
quote_tagalog: Basta kasama ka, lahat maganda gawin.
quote_english: As long as you're with me, everything is wonderful to do.

question_tagalog: Saang aspeto mo nakita nagbago and improve ako the most para satin?
question_english: In what aspect did you see me change and improve the most for us?
quote_tagalog: Nakakabilib ang naging pagbabago mo.
quote_english: Your change has been impressive.

question_tagalog: Anong trait ko bilang partner ang gusto mong tularan?
question_english: What trait of mine as a partner do you want to emulate?
quote_tagalog: Inspire mong maging mabuting tao ko palagi.
quote_english: You inspire me to be a good person always.

question_tagalog: Pano natin mabilis marerecover ang bad days with each other in mind?
question_english: How do we recover bad days fast with each other in mind?
quote_tagalog: Good days or bad days, tayo magkasama parin.
quote_english: Good days or bad days, we are still together.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-naappreciate mong message na sinend ko sayo sa gitna ng busy day?
question_english: What message from me did you appreciate most sent amidst a busy day?
quote_tagalog: Mga texts mo nagpapalakas sakin eh.
quote_english: Your texts really give me strength.

question_tagalog: Kung maikli na buhay natin, anong parte ko ang ipagpapasalamat mo?
question_english: If our lives were short, what part of me will you be thankful for?
quote_tagalog: Salamat dahil ikaw ang ibinigay sakin na tadhana.
quote_english: Thank you because destiny gave you to me.

question_tagalog: Anong kwento tungkol sa atin ang pinaka-proud mong i-share?
question_english: What story about us are you most proud to share?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang pinakamagandang kwento sa buhay ko.
quote_english: We are the best story in my life.

question_tagalog: Pano mo naappreciate na pinalawak ko yung perspective mo about life?
question_english: How did you appreciate that I broadened your perspective about life?
quote_tagalog: Binigyan mo ng kulay ang mga pananaw ko.
quote_english: You gave color to my perspectives.

question_tagalog: Ano yung simpleng bagay na ginagawa ko that just makes your day brighter?
question_english: What simple thing do I do that just makes your day brighter?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang pampa-good vibes ko sapat na.
quote_english: You being my good vibes is enough.

question_tagalog: Ano yung sacrifice mo for our relationship na gusto mong ma-appreciate ko?
question_english: What sacrifice of yours for our relationship do you want me to appreciate?
quote_tagalog: Tinatanaw ko ng malaking utang na loob lahat ng ginawa mo para saten.
quote_english: I am deeply indebted to everything you did for us.

question_tagalog: Paano kita ma-re-reassure ng appreciation tuwing you feel undervalued?
question_english: How can I reassure you of appreciation whenever you feel undervalued?
quote_tagalog: Kakaiba ka sa paningin ko, ikaw lang talaga.
quote_english: You are different in my eyes, just you really.

question_tagalog: Na-realize mo ba na ikaw ang pinaka-greatest blessing nako?
question_english: Have you realized that you're the greatest blessing I have?
quote_tagalog: Walang blessing na tatalo sayo.
quote_english: No blessing can beat you.

question_tagalog: Bakit mo naa-appreciate the way nakikinig ako as you vent out randomly?
question_english: Why do you appreciate the way I listen as you vent out randomly?
quote_tagalog: Handa ko saing makinig kahit abutin araw.
quote_english: I'm ready to listen even if it takes days.

question_tagalog: Ano ang bagay mula satin ang lagi mong ipinagmamalaking pinagdaanan natin?
question_english: What thing from us are you always proud that we went through?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng dinaanan natin, mas nagpa tibay sating dalawa.
quote_english: Everything we went through made us stronger.

question_tagalog: Pano ko ba in-elevate yung view mo in love that you are grateful for?
question_english: How did I elevate your view in love that you are grateful for?
quote_tagalog: Pinaramdam mo saking the true meaning of true love.
quote_english: You let me feel the true meaning of true love.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging kanta yung pasasalamat mo sakin, anong kanta ito?
question_english: If your gratitude to me became a song, what song is it?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang kantang ayoko na matapos.
quote_english: You're the song I don't want to end.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palagi kong inuulit-ulit and you simply love that?
question_english: What do I always repeat and you simply love that?
quote_tagalog: Ang lambing mo talaga pakinggan.
quote_english: You sound really sweet to hear.

question_tagalog: Saang moment ka talagang nasabi sa saril mo thank goodness that I'm with you?
question_english: In what moment did you really tell yourself thank goodness that I'm with you?
quote_tagalog: Ang swerte ko dahil natagpuan kita.
quote_english: I'm so lucky because I found you.

question_tagalog: Ano ang way mo to say 'I appreciate you' ng hindi gumagamit ng words?
question_english: What's your way to say 'I appreciate you' without using words?
quote_tagalog: Mga yakap mo palang parang the world belongs to us.
quote_english: Just your hugs make it seem the world belongs to us.

question_tagalog: Pano nabago ng pasasalamat yung inis natin on our fights?
question_english: How did gratitude change our annoyance on our fights?
quote_tagalog: Matatabunan agad ng pagmamahal lahat ng sa inis ko.
quote_english: Love will immediately cover all my annoyance.

question_tagalog: Kung pwede mong isigaw ang appreciation mo para sakin sa EDSA, pano niyo ito gagawin?
question_english: If you could shout your appreciation for me on EDSA, how will you do it?
quote_tagalog: Aaminin ko globally na mahal kita.
quote_english: I will admit globally that I love you.

question_tagalog: May moments ba before that showed appreciation through acts of service na pinaka love mo?
question_english: Were there moments before that showed appreciation through acts of service you really love?
quote_tagalog: Pag pinagsisilbihan kita, dyan ako pinaka masaya.
quote_english: When I serve you, that's when I'm happiest.

question_tagalog: Pano kaya natin maituturo 'to sa anak natin if eventually we will have one?
question_english: How might we teach this to our child if eventually we will have one?
quote_tagalog: Ituturo natin that showing gratitude will open doors always.
quote_english: We will teach that showing gratitude will open doors always.

question_tagalog: Ano yung isang event natin the whole past year na sobrang naappreciate mo ang galing and patience ko?
question_english: What's one event of ours the whole past year that you really appreciated my skills and patience?
quote_tagalog: Ang galing mo sa lahat ng bagay eh.
quote_english: You're great at everything anyway.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba na ipromise kitang laging iappreciate lahat araw araw without failing?
question_english: Do you want me to promise to appreciate you every day without failing?
quote_tagalog: Kaka appreciate kita hanggang walang humpay.
quote_english: I will keep appreciating you relentlessly.

question_tagalog: Pano ka naapektuhan after ng long text na gratitude ang topic coming from me?
question_english: How were you affected after a long text where gratitude is the topic coming from me?
quote_tagalog: Maiiyak ka sa saya after basahin lahat yun.
quote_english: You'll cry with joy after reading it all.

question_tagalog: In my worst moments, what gave you the courage na i-appreciate ako and be grateful sa akin?
question_english: In my worst moments, what gave you the courage to appreciate me and be grateful for me?
quote_tagalog: Sasaluhin kita ng matinding pagmamahal.
quote_english: I will catch you with intense love.

question_tagalog: Bakit for you we are blessed that all of these tests happen right now amidst expressing appreciations?
question_english: Why is it for you we are blessed that all of these tests happen right now amidst expressing appreciations?
quote_tagalog: Mas nakikita ang pasasalamat kaysa luha.
quote_english: Appreciation is more visible than tears.

question_tagalog: When looking backward na may kulang pala kong naibibigay pero you accepted it fully like gratitude is on your side, what made you that way?
question_english: When looking backward that I lacked giving something but you accepted it fully like gratitude is on your side, what made you that way?
quote_tagalog: Salamat dahil lahat pinagpapasensyahan niyo po.
quote_english: Thank you because you bear everything patiently.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang nagre-resonate na laging nakakapagpangiti para ma-appreciate?
question_english: What word resonates that always makes someone smile to appreciate?
quote_tagalog: Sapat na ang isang Thank you para napangiti ako.
quote_english: One Thank you is enough to make me smile.
